prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第81位持续上升至2026年第72位，近年排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强；2026年声誉数据中未出现东华大学相关负面舆情，学校声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第96位（综合热度162523），评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未出现明显报考热 度信号；材料科学与工程获评第五轮学科评估A等级（"双一流"学科），纺织科学与工程为国家级特色专业和"双一流"建设学科，服装设计与工程为"双一流"学 科，相关专业在招生中具有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类、电气工程等东华大学优势招生专业持续高热推荐，社会关注度高；福建省物理类考生从 2021年11.7万持续增长至2025年19.2万，2026年总考生约26.8万，按历史比例估算物理类约20.4万人，较2025年增加约1.15万人（增幅约6%），竞争加剧。，整体平稳略升；东华大学位于上海市，属于一线城市跨省招生，对福建省考生具有较强地域吸引力；2025年物理类在闽招生59人， 占该校在闽总招生计划的绝大部分，属于该校在福建省的主力招生科类。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次10504名、2026年招生计划与2025年持平（无扩招缓解效应）、福 建省物理类考生增加约6%导致竞争加剧、学校软科排名持续上升（实力增强吸引更多高分考生）、计算机/电子信息等热门专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次将较202 5年小幅后移。预测最低位次约10554名，区间10054–11054名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 8664 → 10561 → 10382 → 10067 → 10504, showing an overall fluctuating backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of approximately 1840 positions over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 10504, and the past 3 years have fluctuated within the 10000–10600 range; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 48 → 49 → 51 → 52 → 59, with continuous small-scale expansion; the 2026 plan is 59, unchanged from 2025. The halt in enrollment expansion weakens the effect of easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 81st in 2021 to 72nd in 2026, reflecting the university's increasing comprehensive strength; in 2026 reputation data, no negative public opinion related to Donghua University appeared, indicating stable reputation; Douyin popularity ranking is 96th (comprehensive popularity 162523), rated as "average", with short video exposure at a moderate level, showing no obvious signal of application heat; Materials Science and Engineering was rated A level in the fifth round of discipline evaluation ("Double First-Class" discipline), Textile Science and Engineering is a national characteristic specialty and "Double First-Class" construction discipline, and Fashion Design and Engineering is a "Double First-Class" discipline, with related majors having strong appeal in enrollment.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering and other advantageous enrollment majors of Donghua University continue to be highly recommended, with high social attention; the number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province has grown from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025, with total examinees in 2026 approximately 268,000, and Physics Category estimated at about 204,000 based on historical proportions, an increase of about 11,500 (approximately 6%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition, overall stable with a slight increase; Donghua University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, and recruits across provinces, having strong regional appeal to Fujian examinees; in 2025, Physics Category enrolled 59 students in Fujian, accounting for the vast majority of the university's total enrollment plan in Fujian, making it the main enrollment category for the university in Fujian Province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10504, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025 (no expansion effect to ease competition), an approximately 6% increase in Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province leading to intensified competition, the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking (enhanced strength attracting more high-scoring students), and the sustained high popularity of Computer Science, Electronic Information and other hot majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10554, with a range of 10054–11054.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Computer Science (including Software Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Information Security)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Electronic Information (including Electrical Engineering and Automation, Automation, Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology
- Intelligent Science and Technology
- Mechanical Engineering
- Mathematics (Finance and Statistics) (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Materials (including Polymer Materials and Engineering, Inorganic Non-metallic Materials Engineering, Composite Materials and Engineering)
- Textiles (including Textile Engineering, Nonwoven Materials and Engineering)
- Chemistry (including Light Chemical Engineering, Applied Chemistry)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (including Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (10054–11054), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information) as reach choices, and Tier 3 majors (Materials, Textiles, etc.) as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<10054), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (>11054), it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 3 majors, while also considering lower-ranking Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 1765 → 1924 → 1940 → 2254 → 2018, showing an overall fluctuating backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 253 places over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2018, fluctuating within the 1940–2254 range in the past 3 years; the enrollment plan for History Category was 12 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 10 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 11 students, an increase of 1 (+10%) compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking on the Soft Science main list has been rising, reaching 72nd in 2026, with steadily increasing comprehensive strength; no negative public opinion about Donghua University appeared in the 2026 reputation data, indicating stable reputation; Douyin popularity is average, with no obvious abnormal signals in application enthusiasm; Materials Science and Engineering, rated A, is the university's strongest discipline, but the History Category enrollment majors (Economic Management Experimental Class, Journalism and Communication Class, Social Science Experimental Class, Economics and Trade Class, Japanese, etc.) have low relevance to the university's flagship disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among History Category enrollment majors, the Economic Management Experimental Class (including Marketing, Financial Management, etc.) shows divided social popularity, the Journalism and Communication Class has clearly discouraging social popularity, and Law (included in the Social Science Experimental Class) is socially recommended but highly competitive; the number of History Category examinees in Fujian Province decreased from 78,000 in 2021 to 60,000 in 2025, with total examinees in 2026 estimated at 268,000, and by historical proportion, History Category examinees are estimated at about 64,000, an increase of about 4,000 (+6.7%) compared to 2025, slightly decreasing; Donghua University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, which has strong appeal for cross-province enrollment to Fujian examinees; in 2025, History Category enrolled 10 students in Fujian, increasing to 11 in 2026, with a small but expanding enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2018, a 10% enrollment expansion in 2026 (slightly easing competition), an increase of about 6.7% in Fujian History Category examinees (intensifying competition), the clearly discouraging social popularity of majors like Journalism and Communication Class potentially affecting application willingness, and the university's rising Soft Science ranking, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be roughly flat or slightly lower (smaller ranking number = easier to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2109, with a range of 1793–2425.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Economic Management Experimental Class (including Marketing, Financial Management, Accounting, Business Administration)
- Social Science Experimental Class (including Law, Administrative Management)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Economics and Trade Class (including International Economics and Trade, Finance)
- Journalism and Communication Class (including Communication, Public Relations)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Japanese (Language)
- English (Language)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (1793–2425), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Economics and Trade Class) as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors (Economic Management Experimental Class, Social Science Experimental Class) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Japanese, English) as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<1793), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors; if your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (>2425), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors.
